examples: When she finds a particularly good bargain, she emails it around or sends it to people over QQ.
With the help of QQ, Wechat, school website and so on, parents and teachers can communicate with each other more easily and often.
We often communicate with each other on QQ or WeChat.
Tencent is well known in China for its instant messenger program QQ, with more than 600 million accounts.
Tencent QQ is already a wildly popular instant messaging platform in China, with over 700 million active users.
